betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Centrifuge§f separates materials by density. §bEssential§f for uranium enrichment and chemical processing.

§eTiers:§f
• Multiple centrifuge tiers with increasing speed and efficiency
• Higher tiers process faster with better separation quality

§eKey Uses:§f
• §bUranium processing§f - Separate isotopes for fuel
• §bChemical separation§f - Split compounds into components
• §bOre processing§f - Extract valuable materials

§eFor Uranium Enrichment:§f
Use §bGas Centrifuge§f instead (specialized for hexafluoride cycles) with:
• 2-4 centrifuges in sequence
• Overclocking upgrades on final stages
• Probability-based output (check NEI)

§aTips:§f
• Automate with hoppers/pipes for continuous operation
• Check NEI for all available recipes
• Different materials require different centrifuge types
